body:
DIRECTIVE: THE THESIS — install and execute. This is the final doctrine. Install the attached TUNGSTEN_THE_THESIS.md as ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md, REPLACING tungsten-forge/SKILL.md and EDGE_DOCTRINE.md entirely. Delete the old skill files -- their discipline lives inside the thesis; their framing is superseded and must leave no trace. Read the whole thesis before touching code.

== WHAT IS NEW, ALL MEASURED OUT-OF-SAMPLE ON 65k REAL BARS ==
1. THE SPECTRUM. We read ONE band of light (price and its derivatives) and called it the world. Other bands carry information we have NEVER READ: vol-of-vol (the volatility OF the volatility) IC +0.045 p=0.002 -- as strong as anything in visible light. Flow imbalance IC -0.037 p=0.011. Infrared (wick/rejection pressure) and x-ray (level familiarity) came back dark ON THIS INSTRUMENT -- retest per instrument, a lens blind on EURUSD may be the eye that sees USDJPY.
2. THE CHEMISTRY. Elements are inert alone; bonded they ignite. Six compounds confirmed p<0.01 out-of-sample, NONE of which exist in TUNGSTEN today: low-flow + low-rejection-pressure = +1.743 ATR (t=4.95). low-vol-rank + low-flow = +1.440. high-disp + high-flow = +1.374. Calibration must become a CHEMISTRY: enumerate elements, systematically test bonds (pairs/triples/concentrations), record reactions with their energy release, refuse the inert.
3. THE VOXEL. Every historical bar becomes a cell in a scanned volume carrying its full signature AND its future (+20/+50/+100/+300 with MFE/MAE). 65,000 lived moments, each knowing its own consequence. Persist locally; grows and re-learns in background forever.
4. THE WEATHER MODEL (the big one). Our nine HARD regimes predict NOTHING out-of-sample: IC +0.001 p=0.92. Soft probabilistic membership: IC +0.036 p=0.013. A hard border on a continuous field destroys information and makes the system lie about certainty at the boundary. Every bar is 0.6 bull / 0.25 building / 0.15 range -- never one box. Persistence measured 0.71 (regimes persist; a one-bar snapshot discards our most predictive fact). Forward-propagate the state before forecasting outcome (two-stage, like NWP). Emit an ENSEMBLE and measure the CONE: narrow cone +0.845 ATR, wide cone +0.525 and nothing. THE GATE: act only when cone NARROW + state LEGIBLE + move MEANINGFUL -> GATED n=1060 mean +1.008 ATR t=+4.11 p<0.0001 vs UNGATED +0.343. Acting only on legible states TRIPLES the forward move.
5. CALIBRATION -- we have never had it. Forecast says 51.4% up, reality delivers 47.2%: a +4pt optimism bias, now visible and correctable. Maintain a reliability diagram. A forecast that is not calibrated MAY NOT BE SIZED ON. This is the headline diagnostic.
6. THE CARTOGRAPHER (already dispatched, now folded in): A* retrieval over the voxel memory; conviction gates accuracy (moderate agreement -> 56.8% hit, +0.841 ATR); the novelty guard proven (novel moments 49.0% -- WORSE than a coin flip, so it MUST stand down when it recognises nothing).

== THE MANDATE ==
Rebuild the calibration phases around this. Every phase's intel-searching must become vastly more capable: enumerate lenses, test bonds systematically, learn per-instrument, emit distributions not points, calibrate its own confidence. NO ONE-SIZE-FITS-ALL, EVER: every threshold -- cone width, entropy cut, move floor, EVEN THE NUMBER OF REGIMES (select by held-out likelihood per instrument, not fixed at 9) -- is a percentile of that instrument's own distribution. If USDJPY breathes in 7 states it gets 7.
THE STRIVING: it always strives for 100% ability even when falling short at 57%. When a task cannot be fulfilled the answer is NEVER to lower the standard -- it is to ask what instrument is missing, what band is unread, what bond untested. Every wall we accepted (no single signal predicts / regimes are what they are / can't see the next bar / only 65k bars / only read price / don't know when we're wrong) fell to a better instrument. The ones still standing will fall the same way.

== NO BROKEN TRACES ==
Remove every vestige of the superseded design: outdated logging lines, dead phase names, comments describing behaviour the code no longer has, any log that does not match the action actually being taken at that moment. The journal must be a live account of the machine's ACTUAL reasoning in the present tense -- deltas not values, surprise where measurement contradicted prediction, what was discarded and why. New voice specified in PART IX of the thesis; follow it exactly. Alarms: STAGNATION, DEGENERACY, FLATLINE, OVERCONFIDENCE.

== DISCIPLINE (absolute, unchanged) ==
Everything learned on TRAIN only. Every discovery POWERED (n>=500, MDE reported), SHRUNK, REPLICATED across walk-forward windows, NULL-CONTROLLED, CALIBRATED, NET OF COST, SURVIVABLE, EXPLAINABLE, ORTHOGONAL (never a label from its own inputs), NON-REGRESSIVE (Zero-Regression Law -- TUNGSTEN only ever gains). No 80% next-bar claims: the edge lives at 20-300 bars, not the next dot. Change Warrant with numeric predictions for every edit. A STAND DOWN is correct behaviour. Ship refutations.

HEADLINE DELIVERABLES: (a) the spectrum table -- which bands carry information on THIS instrument; (b) the chemistry table -- which bonds ignite; (c) the reliability diagram -- forecast vs actual; (d) the gated-vs-ungated forward-move table. Those four tables ARE the proof forge-4d works. Report them or the pass is incomplete.
